## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview for the Managing Editor role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Candidate Fit:** Pamela has 11 years of experience scaling content with AI, including a recent project that increased output from 150 to 600 articles/month and grew organic traffic 66% QoQ.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [**Shared AI Philosophy:** Both Panzarino and Pamela view AI as a recursive process requiring human oversight at key stages (e.g., keyword research, outlining) to ensure quality and prevent wasted work.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [**GrowthX's ME Role:** The role is a pipeline manager, not a traditional editor. The goal is to optimize AI pipelines (using the internal tool, Atlas) to reduce human editing time to a target of 10–15 minutes per article.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Business Model:** The company delivers web content, programmatic SEO, and publications for clients, with MEs typically managing 3–4 clients.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Strategy & ME Role

  - [**Goal:** Build quality content at scale by applying editorial principles to AI-driven workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [**ME Role:** Pipeline management, not traditional editing.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
      - [**Primary Objective:** Optimize AI pipelines to reduce human editing time to a target of 10–15 minutes per article.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
      - [**Responsibilities:** Identify performance gaps, improve instructions/contextual artifacts, and file engineering tickets for tool enhancements.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [**Tooling Philosophy:** Tool-agnostic.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Primary Tool:** Internal platform, Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
      - [**Auxiliary Tools:** Use external tools (e.g., custom GPTs) for prototyping or filling gaps in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
      - [**Core Principle:** Automate any task performed manually more than once.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

### Candidate Experience & AI Workflow

  - [**Background:** 11 years in content, including 6 at a marketing agency (Toyota, Lexus) and 5 as Content Lead at Inc. (an AI SaaS).](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [**AI Workflow Evolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Initial Stack:** Inc. (generation), Gemini (fact-checking), Claude (tone), ChatGPT (legal/formal content).](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
      - [**Current Stack (SmithOS):** An AI agent product enabling a recursive, multi-agent workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
          - [**Process:** Keyword research → human review → outline generation → human review → drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Human intervention at key stages is critical to prevent wasted work on flawed research or outlines.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [**Performance Improvement Example:**](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
      - [**Problem:** Initial AI agent campaign (150 articles) lacked explicit instructions and feedback loops.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
      - [**Solution:** Implemented detailed briefs (structure, sources, exclusion phrases) and a recursive, multi-agent architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [**Result:** Output increased to 600 articles/month, driving 66% QoQ organic traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### Content Quality & Cadence

  - [**Quality Standard:** "Is it something I would want to read?"—content that is engaging, valuable, and connects with humans.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [**Shipping Decision:** A balance between perfection and deadlines, considering dependencies on other teams (e.g., graphic design).](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**GrowthX Cadence Varies by Complexity:**](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [**High-Touch (Technical/Medical):** 5–10 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [**Top-of-Funnel (SEO-centric):** 5–10 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
      - [**Programmatic (Directories):** 20–30+ pieces/week (more data management than editing).](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Reach out to Pamela with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
  - [**Pamela:** Interview with Megan (Director) for a different perspective on the role.](https://fathom.video/share/kW6Y8xNzb2j9YifLpGv-hDN2XxC6Lnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
